title: SHATCHI 100 LED/10m Fairy String Lights Silver Wire Battery Operated Warm White LEDs Twinkle Waterproof Lights for Bedroom, Christmas, Party, Wedding Outdoor Indoor Decoration
features: 🎄💡【100 LED Fairy Lights】: Each decorative string light is with 10M/32.80ft feet moldable copper wire and 40pcs glowing mini LEDs with warm white effect, ideal for table, bedroom, wedding, party, birthday, Halloween, Christmas, New Year decoration.

🎄🔋【Battery Powered】: 3 AA Batteries Required for each string lights (Batteries not included); Each decorative fairy light ends with a clear battery case for the batteries and switch the power button on to operate the light.

🎄🌟【Endless DIY Possibility】: Silver Copper wire is quite flexible, easily bent into any shape you like, great to DIY a night light, put in mason jars, hanging pictures, decorate Christmas trees, garland, or any other festival decorations.

🎄✅【IP44 Waterproof & Safe to Touch】: Sustains any weather, and can even be submerged in water (except the BATTERY BOX), suitable for indoors and outdoors. The LEDs used are low heat emission and remains cool after many hours of usage, remaining safe to the touch. No glare, and the soft warm lights in order to protect your eyes.

🎄 🎉【Widely use & Durable】: Perfect for Indoor and outdoor celebration./Wedding/Christmas/Party Decor /Backdrops/Yards/canopy/bed, flowers, wreaths, Christmas trees and bouquets to create a warm, joyful, romantic and festive ambiance for Valentine's Day, Halloween, birthday party, date, garden, home, bedroom, Christmas, holiday and wedding.
description: From the manufacturer SHATCHI LED Copper Wire Lights Specifications: Material: Copper Wire Colour: Gold Light Colour: Warm White Total Length 20 LED: 2.3m - Length Between 1st To Last LED: 2m App. Lead Wire Length: 30Cm Total Length 40 LED: 4.3m - Length Between 1st To Last LED: 4m App. Lead Wire Length: 30Cm Total Length 100 LED: 10.3m - Length Between 1st To Last LED: 10m App. Lead Wire Length: 30Cm No Of LEDs: 20/40/100 Power Source: 3 x AA Batteries (not included) Energy Efficient, No Heat Problems: Low Power Consumption, The Ultra Slim Thin Copper Wire, Bendable But Sturdy Wire With LED Lights Is Waterproof Widely Used For Decoration Special Features Waterproof Copper wires are Water-resistant, so there is no any problem to use it in the rain. It is tiny size so easily to hide away and disappear from the scene. NOTE: the battery box is not waterproof so do not expose it to water. Easy To Shape & Mould Thanks to the flexible and thin copper wire materials, it can be bent and shaped easily; Such as shaped around plants, signs, furniture and almost everything else Presentable Packaging Supplied in lovely designed black box.
